title: betula × sandbergii
intro: Betula × sandbergii, also known as the hybrid silver birch or River Birch, is a hybrid tree resulting from the cross between Betula papyrifera and Betula populifolia. The bark of the Betula × sandbergii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Betula × sandbergii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Betula × sandbergii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
